C1-FM-01: modeled confusion signals such as repeat please or show me
pause for explicit understanding check before error escalation
normalization of clarification as part of learning
C1-FM-02: sentence frames naming likely clarification needs
prompt to point to the unclear step word or example
separation of whole-task repeat from one-part repeat requests
C1-FM-03: one required next action after clarification
short reattempt to test whether the clarification is usable
